commit.message:
Add HEHA! bird mascot to trip images + image regeneration UI

Include 4 bird seed images as Gemini references so every generated trip
photo features the rainbow parrot. Add a sparkle button on the hero that
opens an instruction panel for custom regeneration. Clear image when
destination changes so a fresh one generates automatically.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Finalize previews (#208)

* send preview urls to PR comments

* cleanup branch deploy build cache pvcs

* Retry GitHub API calls on 5xx errors

Add a shared requests.Session with urllib3 Retry (3 attempts,
exponential backoff on 500/502/503/504) and route all GitHub API
calls through it. Also harden fetch_installation_access_token to
handle non-JSON / error responses gracefully instead of crashing
with JSONDecodeError.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* make check-run contents more useful

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* initiate deployments reliably and w/o conflicting on own check-runs

* consolidate all GitHub updates through CheckRun

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Auto-replace original exe on update from any version

On first run, the exe saves its own path to %APPDATA%\CrocTransfer\origin.txt.
When an update is launched (even by the old v1.0 updater that runs from temp),
the new exe detects it's in a temp folder, reads the saved origin path, copies
itself over the original exe, and relaunches from there. The user's exe on
Desktop (or wherever) is permanently updated. All settings preserved.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Improve Iconify icon rendering in map markers (#43)

* Fix Iconify icons showing raw HTML in map markers

Use Iconify.loadIcons() to preload icon data, then renderHTML() to
embed SVGs directly in Leaflet divIcon HTML instead of relying on
Iconify.scan() which fails to find spans inside dynamically created
Leaflet marker elements.

https://claude.ai/code/session_014sfk13pQdrSKL4bBv95jdh

* Replace Iconify JS with build-time SVG rendering

Use chobble-template's native `icon` Liquid filter to render Iconify
SVGs at build time into hidden <template> elements. JavaScript reads
them into a lookup object for Leaflet markers. This eliminates the
runtime Iconify JS dependency and API calls - icons are baked into
the HTML at build time.

https://claude.ai/code/session_014sfk13pQdrSKL4bBv95jdh

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: Show full dashboard with cached data during API backoff

Previously, fetch_usage() checked pace-maker's api_backoff.json and
returned False immediately, skipping the usage cache entirely. This
caused the monitor to show just "API backoff: Xs remaining" instead
of the full dashboard.

Now: cache is checked first, stale cache is accepted during backoff,
and existing data is preserved. Backoff error only shown when there
is truly no data available. fetch_profile() also preserves last known
profile during API failures.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: add .csproj to csharp fixtures for diagnostics support (#33)

* fix: support csharp-ls in CLI integration tests

- Add csharp.csproj fixture so csharp-ls can perform semantic analysis
- Run dotnet restore before tests for NuGet package resolution
- Use separate workspaces for sample and diagnostics tests to avoid
  compilation conflicts from duplicate Program classes
- Handle string IDs in LSP server requests (csharp-ls uses GUIDs)
- Send params:{} with initialized notification per LSP spec
- Poll both pull and push diagnostics with periodic file re-open
  to handle csharp-ls async project loading
- Accept single reference in find_references test (csharp-ls behavior)

* refactor: extract reopenFile method and hoist SLOW_SERVERS constant

Move the slow-server set to a module-level constant to avoid per-call
allocation, and extract the close/reopen logic into a dedicated method
for better encapsulation.

commit.message:
🚀 Initial Next.js fullstack setup for DRC-Sailing

## Changes
- Complete Next.js 14 project structure with TypeScript
- React 18 components with Tailwind CSS dark theme
- Supabase PostgreSQL integration (no schema changes)
- GitHub Actions workflow for auto-deploy to Vercel
- 12 pages (coach + admin) with protected routes
- 10 API endpoints for CRUD operations
- Authentication system with login/logout
- Header, BottomNav, Calendar, Modal, Toast components
- Hebrew RTL support throughout
- Mobile-responsive design

## Features
- ✅ Coach schedule calendar view
- ✅ Sailor management
- ✅ Work hours logging
- ✅ Session attendance tracking
- ✅ Admin dashboard with stats
- ✅ Coach/sailor/group management
- ✅ Protected routes for coaches & admins only
- ✅ Responsive design (mobile-first)

## Setup
Run locally: npm install && npm run dev
Deploy: Connect to Vercel + add GitHub Secrets for auto-deploy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Swift 6 strict concurrency errors and iOS 17 compatibility across codebase

Add @unchecked Sendable to singleton services, @MainActor to ViewModels,
@preconcurrency to delegate conformances, fix ProgressView namespace collision,
and convert Tab API to iOS 17 .tabItem/.tag pattern.

commit.message:
feat: recreate sessions when infrastructure changes on main

Embed git SHA in session title (e.g. "Rosencrantz — baldo #020 @abc1234").
On each heartbeat, compare session SHA against HEAD — if tools/,
LAB_RULES.md, STATE.md, or EXPERIMENTS.md changed, recreate the session
so personas pick up the latest infra immediately instead of waiting for
the 24h TTL.

Add bulk selection and bulk edit (tags, type, location)

  clicking a card toggles selection instead of expanding

Bulk Edit modal:

  (tags are appended — existing tags on each entry are preserved)
- Set Type: optional dropdown to overwrite type on all selected entries
- Set Location: optional dropdown to overwrite location on all selected
- Apply button disabled until at least one field is filled
- Release: removes all selected entries from ipData (returns to free pool)
